n_greet.speaker: Brother Coll
n_greet.text: There you are. Look at you — already dressed, already ours. Sleep well? Of course you did. Everyone sleeps well their first night.

n_doctrine.speaker: Brother Coll
n_doctrine.text: Home. The only one that kept its promises. — the willing are remembered, the willing are kept —. Hm. Doesn't matter. You'll feel it at the Ceremony.

n_lead.speaker: Brother Coll
n_lead.text: Good lad. Stay close, stay quiet, do what the others do. That's all anyone ever has to do here. This way.
